sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33334" key="e)laio/qhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιό-θηλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33334.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nurturing olives</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νᾶμα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.1374</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
